testcase.name: testBestMove(String, List, Integer)[1]

19:12:30.847 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.SearchConcurrencyPlanner -- Search concurrency plan: availableProcessors=24, searchThreads=16 (user), lazySmpThreads=8 (user), rootParallelLimit=72 (user), ttMb=256 (user) 19:12:30.995 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.SearchConcurrencyPlanner -- Search concurrency plan: availableProcessors=24, searchThreads=16 (user), lazySmpThreads=8 (user), rootParallelLimit=72 (user), ttMb=256 (user) 19:12:31.028 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.tuning.EngineTuningBootstrap -- Loaded 1 tuning configurations from classpath:tuning/seed-tunings.yaml 19:12:31.063 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.tuning.EngineTuningBootstrap -- Applied engine tuning "v3.8.2-v3f_bishopAtk9" from classpath:tuning/seed-tunings.yaml (1 configurations available). 19:12:32.452 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.OpeningBookLoader -- Loaded opening book from cache (360 entries) 19:12:32.473 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.OpeningBook -- Opening book initialised with 131 unique positions (cache hit) 19:12:32.493 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.SearchConcurrencyPlanner -- Search concurrency plan: availableProcessors=24, searchThreads=16 (user), lazySmpThreads=8 (user), rootParallelLimit=72 (user), ttMb=256 (user) 19:12:32.574 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.AI -- ### SearchThreads = 16, LazySmpThreads = 8
=== Engine decision statistics === FEN: 3R4/8/P4pk1/rP4p1/8/8/1K6/8 w - - 3 65 Side to move: White Expected best moves: [Kc1, Kc2, Kc3] Baseline evaluation: +1.24 pawns Search configuration: runtimeCores=24, searchThreads=16, lazySmpThreads=8, rootParallelLimit=72, ttSize=256 MB, multiThreaded=yes Depth target: 8, deepest completed iteration: 8 Chosen move: Kc3 -> +1.36 pawns (Δ vs baseline: +0.12) [rank #3] Engine top move: Rd7 -> +2.15 pawns (Δ vs chosen: -0.07) Nodes visited: 726561, null-move prunes: 13889, search duration: 3631 ms Top candidates by evaluation: 1. Rd7 -> +2.15 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.79) 2. Rh8 -> +2.11 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.75) 3. Kc3 -> +2.08 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.72) 4. Kc2 -> +2.07 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.71) 5. Kc1 -> +1.91 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.55) Expected move evaluations: Kc1 -> +1.91 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.55) Kc2 -> +2.07 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.71) Kc3 -> +2.08 pawns Evaluation delta vs engine best: -0.07 pawns Principal variation: Kc3 (+1.36 pawns) -> Ra1 (-1.36 pawns) -> Kb2 (+1.36 pawns) -> Ra5 (-1.36 pawns) -> Kc3 (+1.36 pawns) ==================================
